title: Ancient Book applies its equip combat stat suite after Lightning trigger

card.rawText: When your opponent plays a Lightning card, you may equip this card to a creature as an Infinite magic card. Atk: +15. Hit: +5. AL: +8. SPD: +5.

effect.value: When your opponent plays a Lightning card, you may equip this card to a creature as an Infinite magic card. Atk: +15. Hit: +5. AL: +8. SPD: +5.

plan.title: Ancient Book applies its equip combat stat suite after Lightning trigger
plan.summary: Treat Ancient Book as equipped after an opponent Lightning trigger and verify its Atk/Hit combat modifiers are active.

notes: Read text first: after opponent plays Lightning, Ancient Book may equip as Infinite magic with Atk +15, Hit +5, AL +8, SPD +5.

steps: Equip Ancient Book to player_1 primary in the triggered state.

expectedAssertions.label: Atk +15 raises first strike damage to 16
Battle log includes Ancient Book Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm live response timing only exposes Ancient Book when the opponent plays a Lightning card.
riskNotes: Current effective stat assertion paths do not expose the equipped AL/SPD bonus here, so this fixture proves the combat Atk/Hit portion.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Treat Ancient Book as equipped after an opponent Lightning trigger and verify its Atk/Hit combat modifiers are active.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
